code: import React,{useState,useEffect}from"react";import Modal,{ModalBody,ModalFooter,ModalTransition}from"@atlaskit/modal-dialog";import Button from"@atlaskit/button";import DynamicTable from"@atlaskit/dynamic-table";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";export const PreviewIssueTable=_ref=>{let{issues,isOpen,setOpen,loadingPreview,issueType}=_ref;const head={cells:[{key:"id",content:"ID",isSortable:true},{key:"description",content:"Description",isSortable:true}]};const[rows,setRows]=useState([]);useEffect(()=>{if(issues!==undefined)setRows(issues.map(issue=>({key:issue.key,cells:[{key:issue.key,content:issue.key},{key:issue.description,content:issue.description}]})));},[issues]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(ModalTransition,{children:isOpen&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(Modal,{onClose:()=>setOpen(false),children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(ModalBody,{children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(DynamicTable,{caption:"Preview Issues - ".concat(issueType),head:head,rows:rows,emptyView:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{children:"No issues found, try another issue type"}),isLoading:loadingPreview})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(ModalFooter,{children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Button,{appearance:"subtle",onClick:()=>setOpen(false),children:"Close"})})]})});};
